title: European Forum Alpbach Scholarship Programme 2026 (EFA26) | Fully Funded Opportunity for Global Youth
summary: The European Forum Alpbach Scholarship Programme 2026 is now open for applications, offering a fully funded opportunity for students, young professionals, and emerging leaders from around the world to participate in one of Europe s most prestigious interdisciplinary forums. Held annually in the Austrian Alps, the European Forum Alpbach (EFA) brings together future changemakers, policymakers, researchers, and innovators to exchange ideas, build leadership skills, and shape solutions for Europe and the world. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(119); }); This scholarship programme is designed for first-time participants who want to gain international exposure, expand their networks, and engage in high-level dialogue across sectors. About the European Forum Alpbach Scholarship Programme Every year, hundreds of young talents travel to Alpbach to take part in a unique two-week experience that combines academic learning, policy dialogue, and cross-cultural exchange. Scholarship holders are at the heart of the Forum and are the only participants who remain for the full duration of the event. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(127); }); The programme includes: Scientific, competence-based, and artistic seminars and studios High-level conferences with global decision-makers and experts Leadership and skills development sessions Interdisciplinary discussions and networking opportunities Social and cultural activities designed to foster collaboration Approximately 350 scholarships are awarded annually by the European Forum Alpbach and the Forum Alpbach Network (FAN). ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(128); }); Application Dates for EFA Scholarship 2026 Applicants should take note of the official application period: Applications open: 2 March 2026 Application deadline: 22 March 2026 (11:59 PM CET) Due to the competitive nature of the programme, early preparation is strongly recommended. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(129); }); Why Apply for the European Forum Alpbach Scholarship? The EFA Scholarship Programme offers more than financial support. It provides an immersive leadership experience that helps participants grow professionally and personally while engaging with some of the most pressing issues facing Europe and the world. Key benefits include: Full participation in the European Forum Alpbach event Access to influential policymakers, academics, and industry leaders International networking with peers from diverse backgrounds Opportunities for leadership development and interdisciplinary learning Long-term connection to a global alumni community EFA as a Lifelong Community Participation in the European Forum Alpbach does not end after the event. Scholarship holders become part of the Forum Alpbach Network (FAN), a strong international alumni community dedicated to promoting dialogue and cooperation across borders. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(130); }); The network includes: 34 alumni initiatives Representation across 20 countries Year-round events and collaboration opportunities A growing community committed to shaping a better Europe How to Apply for the EFA Scholarship Programme Applicants can submit their applications through two pathways depending on their regional affiliation. Applications will be open from 2-22 March 2026 (2 pm 11:59 pm CET) Application via the Forum Alpbach Network (FAN) Applicants with nationality or residency ties to specific FAN clubs must apply through their respective alumni club. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(131); }); FAN clubs with separate scholarship selection processes include: These are the FAN clubs who offer EFA-scholarships and have a separate selection process: CA Burgenland , CA Liechtenstein , CA Nieder sterreich , CA Poland, CA Upper Austria , CA Salzburg , CA Senza Confini (Carinthia, Northern Italy and Slovenia), CA Steiermark , CA S dtirol Alto Adige , CA Tirol , CA Vorarlberg , IG Wien . Applicants should consult the relevant FAN club website for detailed requirements and deadlines. Application via the European Forum Alpbach (EFA) If there is no FAN club in your country, or your local club does not have its own selection process, you may apply directly via the EFA online application platform. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(132); }); Important application rules: The scholarship is open to international applicants worldwide, with a special focus on Europe outside Austria Applications must be submitted through the official online portal Incomplete applications will not be accepted Applications submitted by email will not be considered Missing documents submitted after the deadline will not be reviewed ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(133); }); Special note: Nationals or permanent residents of ROC Taiwan must apply via the Lung Yingtai Cultural Foundation. Documents Required for the Application Applicants should prepare all required documents before beginning the application process. Ensuring completeness and accuracy is essential, as incomplete applications may be automatically rejected. Disqualification Policy and Use of AI The organisers clearly state that applications may be disqualified if: ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(134); }); Minimum eligibility criteria are not met The letter of motivation is generated using artificial intelligence Applicants are encouraged to submit authentic and original application materials. Q A Webinars for Applicants To support prospective applicants, the organisers are hosting official Q A webinars where participants can speak directly with the scholarship team. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(135); }); Webinar schedule: Do you still have questions? Sign up for one of our Q A webinars on the EFA26 scholarship programme and talk directly to the organisers. Webinar #1 Thursday, 26 February 2026 5:30 pm 6:30 pm (CET). Register here. Webinar #2 Wednesday, 4 March 2026 5:30 pm 6:30 pm (CET). Register here. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(136); }); Webinar #3 Tuesday, 17 March 2026 9:30 am 10:30 am (CET). Register here. Contact Information For additional questions about the scholarship programme: Email: scholarships@alpbach.org Contact person: Melissa N met, Unit Communities, Stakeholder Manager, Scholarship Programme ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(137); }); Who Should Apply? The European Forum Alpbach Scholarship Programme is ideal for: Students and recent graduates Young professionals and early-career leaders Researchers and policy enthusiasts Social impact practitioners and civic leaders Youth changemakers interested in global dialogue and European affairs Applications will be open from 2-22 March 2026 (2 pm 11:59 pm CET) The European Forum Alpbach Scholarship Programme 2026 is a highly competitive, fully funded opportunity for young leaders seeking international exposure, meaningful dialogue, and long-term professional growth. With access to influential networks, interdisciplinary learning, and a vibrant alumni community, the programme offers a powerful platform for those ready to contribute to shaping the future of Europe and beyond.
